question.label: Early decisions
question.name: Where specifically are decisions getting made before you shape them?
question.description: Pins the pattern to a concrete decision point before moving the arc forward.

answer: Some feedback has been about being clearer with non-technical partners.

assessment.note: She cites feedback about being clearer with non-technical partners, confirming a strong clarity gap; [THREAD-DEFERRED] concrete examples of those partner interactions should be picked up next session.

new_queue.label: Impact evidence

new_queue.name: What did you do this quarter to make your work visible to the right stakeholders?

new_queue.name: What kind of call did you hold too long before escalating this quarter?

new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to work on first over the next quarter?
